                    </svg>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

                      <div class="dyksb text-center">Did you know</div>

                                                <div class="dyksb-box p-2"  style="-webkit-border-radius:0px 0px 15px 15px !important" >
                          <div class="dyksb-text">A blue whale&#039;s tongue can weigh as much as an elephant.</div>
                        </div>
                         
                                                <div class="dyksb-box p-2" >
                          <div class="dyksb-text">A porcupine can have up to 30,000 quills.</div>
                        </div>
                         
                                                <div class="dyksb-box p-2" >
                          <div class="dyksb-text">A group of crows is called a &quot;murder.&quot;</div>
                        </div>
                         
                                                <div class="dyksb-box p-2" >
                          <div class="dyksb-text">A cheetah&#039;s tail is crucial for balance while running at high speeds.</div>
